evidence.snippet:
### SP-180 HF SRE
Another variant is the [SP-180 HF SRE](https://skypower-international.com/product/sp-180-hf-sre/), which has been optimized for operation with heavy fuel and is therefore ideal for ISR missions.

products.name: Twin Spark Ignition
products.descriptor: Dual-ignition system for UAV engines providing redundant spark for safety and reliability

evidence.snippet: For this purpose, [Sky Power has developed its own Twin Spark Ignition](https://skypower-international.com/product/twin-spark-ignition-45-cm/). The Twin Spark Ignition from Sky Power International is the ideal choice for all UAV operators who demand the highest reliability, maximum efficiency and safety. With its innovative twin spark technology, robust design and universal compatibility, this ignition system sets new standards in the UAV industry.

products.name: SP-55 FI TS Generator application

evidence.snippet:
SP-55 FI TS Generator application
Configurate in shop

### SP-55 FI TS
The [SP-55 FI TS](https://skypower-international.com/product/sp-55-fi-ts-generator-application/) is a 2-stroke-engine, which was specially developed for smaller UAVs and impresses with its compactness and efficiency.
